title: adenophora borealis
intro: Adenophora borealis, also known as the boreal lilytur, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Adenophora borealis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Adenophora borealis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
